name: Thirty Pieces of Silver
oracleText:
When Thirty Pieces of Silver enters the battlefield, create three Treasure tokens.
{T}, Sacrifice Thirty Pieces of Silver: Add one mana of any color.
flavorText: "They covenanted with him for thirty pieces of silver." — Matthew 26:15
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Rembrandt's "Judas Repentant, Returning the Pieces of Silver" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Rembrandt, Judas Repentant, Returning the Pieces of Silver
classics.sourceNotes: This is the strongest classics subject match for the silver card.
